mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job gains above 100k signal robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k monthly gains.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production above 115 signals strong manufacturing activity that supports corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 115.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and declining inflation signals a 'Goldilocks' macro environment that supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 60%+ of instances where both GDPC1 > 10900 and CPIAUCSL < 190.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles marked by Fed funds rates above 4% compress equity valuations through higher discount rates, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment above 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer confidence, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts above 2000k signal increased residential construction activity that boosts demand for goods and services, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 2000.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real sales and industrial production signals strong demand conditions that support corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where both RSAFS > 340k and INDPRO > 115.
